Raw Interrupt Status

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x44
Size:
0x4
Source:
gpio_rf.rdl

Description

Raw interrupt status for Port A before masking is applied. Read-only. 0=inactive, 1=active interrupt pending.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:0] raw_intstatus r 0x0 RAW_INTSTATUS
